nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_enable
nml_option.description: If true, ocean analysis member fmeDerivedFields is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the fmeDerivedFields analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_stream_output_interval
nml_option.description: Output interval for the fmeDerivedFields stream. Format: YY-MM-DD_HH:MM:SS
nml_option.possible_values: Any valid MPAS time interval string

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_horiz_remap_file
nml_option.description: Path to ESMF/TempestRemap weight file for horizontal remapping to lat-lon grid. When set, derived fields are also written to a separate remapped NetCDF file.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDerivedFields_time_averaging
nml_option.description: If true, remapped output fields are time-averaged over the output interval instead of instantaneous. Set compute_interval to a frequent value (e.g. dt) when enabling.

package.name: fmeDerivedFieldsAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the fmeDerivedFields analysis member.

var.name: sst
var.description: Sea surface temperature extracted from top-level temperature tracer

var.name: sss
var.description: Sea surface salinity extracted from top-level salinity tracer

var.name: surfaceHeatFluxTotal
var.description: Total surface downward heat flux (shortwave + longwave down + latent + sensible)

var.name: snowFluxLf
var.description: snowFlux multiplied by latent heat of fusion (kg m^-2 s^-1 * J kg^-1). Sign convention follows snowFlux.

var.name: iceRunoffFluxLf
var.description: iceRunoffFlux multiplied by latent heat of fusion. Sign convention follows iceRunoffFlux.

var.name: riverRunoffFluxTemperature
var.description: riverRunoffFlux multiplied by top-layer temperature. Native mass-flux units; divide by reference fresh-water density to convert to m degC s^-1.
